creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text: I'm not quite sure about the actual reason for this error (there is some weird interaction between rpath and LD_LIBRARY_PATH there), but it can be worked around with LD_32_LIBMAP="libgcc_s.so.1 /usr/lib32/libgcc_s.so.1". We should probably add this to our wow64 wrapper script.
